title: SENIOR CITIZEN WATER DISCOUNT - 211info
text: CITY OF CORNELIUS SENIOR CITIZEN WATER DISCOUNT Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides a monthly discount on the base water rate. 1355 N Barlow Street Cornelius, OR 97113 Eligibility: Age 65 and older. Must reside at the address receiving the discount and is responsible for making payments directly to the City for water service for the address listed on the application. Hours: Monday-Friday 9am-noon and 1pm-5pm Email (503) 357-9112 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers (503) 357-9112 Main phone Main phone (503) 357-9112 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Visit website for application. Call for more information. FEES: None DOCUMENTS: Proof of age AREA SERVED: City of Cornelius Services: Discounted Water Service * Older Adults Other Services Offered At This Location: COMMUNITY GROUPS AND GOVERNMENT/ADMINISTRATIVE OFFICES - CITY OF CORNELIUS If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. CITY OF CORNELIUS
